title: Placeable Shields
description: Adds the ability to place shields
body:
# Functionality
It adds the abillity to place shields as if they were blocks, to place a shield you have to **Sneak(Shift) + interact(Right Click)**, to get your shield back, stand in shield and press **interact(Right Click)**.

### Video demonstration
